[Source](https://github.com/LibreOffice/translations/blob/master/source/bn/officecfg/registry/data/org/openoffice/Office/UI.po#L19200-L19204) Caller evidence: C1; established UI. | verified |
| `F-bn-004` | `bn` | `tools.marker.textColor` | missing scope | `"аҰІа§ҮаҰ–аҰҫ"` | `"аҰІа§ҮаҰ–аҰҫаҰ° аҰ°аҰҷ"` | Current value omits вҖңcolor.вҖқ Caller evidence: C2; EN-003. | verified |
| `F-bn-005` | `bn` | `tools.toggle.bodyPlaceholder` | malformed hint | `"аҰ–аҰҫаҰІаҰҝ аҰҹаҰ—аҰІаҘӨ аҰ¬а§ҚаҰІаҰ•аҰ—а§ҒаҰІаҰҝ аҰӯа§ҮаҰӨаҰ°а§Ү аҰ•а§ҚаҰІаҰҝаҰ• аҰ•аҰ°а§ҒаҰЁ аҰ¬аҰҫ аҰҹа§ҮаҰЁа§Ү аҰҶаҰЁа§ҒаҰЁаҘӨ"` | `"аҰ–аҰҫаҰІаҰҝ аҰҹаҰ—аҰІаҘӨ аҰ¬а§ҚаҰІаҰ• аҰҜа§ӢаҰ— аҰ•аҰ°аҰӨа§Ү аҰ•а§ҚаҰІаҰҝаҰ• аҰ•аҰ°а§ҒаҰЁ аҰ…аҰҘаҰ¬аҰҫ аҰҸаҰ–аҰҫаҰЁа§Ү аҰ¬а§ҚаҰІаҰ• аҰҹа§ҮаҰЁа§Ү аҰҶаҰЁа§ҒаҰЁаҘӨ"` | Current wording incorrectly tells users to click blocks вҖңinside.вҖқ Caller evidence: C3; EN-004. | verified |
| `F-bn-006` | `bn` | `tools.table.clearSelection` | action accuracy | `"аҰёаҰҫаҰ« аҰ•аҰ°а§ҒаҰЁ"` | `"аҰ¬аҰҝаҰ·аҰҜаҰјаҰ¬аҰёа§ҚаҰӨа§Ғ аҰёаҰҫаҰ« аҰ•аҰ°а§ҒаҰЁ"` | Operation clears content while retaining cells and formatting. Caller evidence: C4; EN-037. | verified |
| `F-bn-007` | `bn` | `tools.table.placement` | wrong terminology | `"аҰ…аҰ¬аҰёа§ҚаҰҘаҰҫаҰЁ"` | `"аҰёаҰҫаҰ°аҰҝаҰ¬аҰҰа§ҚаҰ§аҰ•аҰ°аҰЈ"` | Picker controls cell-content alignment, not position. Caller evidence: C4; EN-009. | verified |
| `F-bn-008` | `bn` | `a11y.dragHandleRole` | accessibility clarity | `"аҰҹаҰҫаҰЁ-аҰ№аҰҫаҰӨаҰІ"` | `"аҰҹа§ҮаҰЁа§Ү аҰёаҰ°аҰҫаҰЁа§ӢаҰ° аҰ№аҰҫаҰӨаҰІ"` | Existing literal compound is unnatural and does not clearly describe the handle. Caller evidence: C5; CTX. | verified |
| `F-bn-009` | `bn` | `a11y.searchResults` | accessibility scope | `"{count}аҰҹаҰҝ аҰ«аҰІаҰҫаҰ«аҰІ"` | `"аҰ…аҰЁа§ҒаҰёаҰЁа§ҚаҰ§аҰҫаҰЁа§ҮаҰ° аҰ«аҰІаҰҫаҰ«аҰІ: {count}"` | Generic вҖңresultsвҖқ omits that these are search results. Caller evidence: C6; EN-021. | verified |
| `F-bn-010` | `bn` | `a11y.navigationModeEntered` | accessibility grammar | `"аҰЁа§ҮаҰӯаҰҝаҰ—а§ҮаҰ¶аҰЁ аҰ®а§ӢаҰЎаҘӨ аҰ¬а§ҚаҰІаҰ•аҰ—а§ҒаҰІа§ӢаҰ° аҰ®аҰ§а§ҚаҰҜа§Ү аҰҜа§ҮаҰӨа§Ү аҰ…а§ҚаҰҜаҰҫаҰ°а§Ӣ аҰ•а§Җ, аҰёаҰ®а§ҚаҰӘаҰҫаҰҰаҰЁаҰҫ аҰ•аҰ°аҰӨа§Ү Enter аҰҸаҰ¬аҰӮ аҰ¬а§ҮаҰ°аҰҝаҰҜаҰја§Ү аҰҜа§ҮаҰӨа§Ү Escape аҰ¬а§ҚаҰҜаҰ¬аҰ№аҰҫаҰ° аҰ•аҰ°а§ҒаҰЁаҘӨ"` | `"аҰЁа§ҮаҰӯаҰҝаҰ—а§ҮаҰ¶аҰЁ аҰ®а§ӢаҰЎаҘӨ аҰ¬а§ҚаҰІаҰ•аҰ—а§ҒаҰІа§ӢаҰ° аҰ®аҰ§а§ҚаҰҜа§Ү аҰҜа§ҮаҰӨа§Ү аҰӨа§ҖаҰ°аҰҡаҰҝаҰ№а§ҚаҰЁа§ҮаҰ° аҰ•а§ҖаҰ—а§ҒаҰІа§Ӣ аҰ¬а§ҚаҰҜаҰ¬аҰ№аҰҫаҰ° аҰ•аҰ°а§ҒаҰЁ, аҰёаҰ®а§ҚаҰӘаҰҫаҰҰаҰЁаҰҫ аҰ•аҰ°аҰӨа§Ү Enter аҰҡаҰҫаҰӘа§ҒаҰЁ аҰҸаҰ¬аҰӮ аҰ¬а§ҮаҰ° аҰ№аҰӨа§Ү Escape аҰҡаҰҫаҰӘа§ҒаҰЁаҘӨ"` | Removes unnecessary вҖңarrowвҖқ transliteration and assigns a clear action to every key. GoogleвҖҷs Bengali accessibility UI uses `аҰӨа§ҖаҰ°аҰҡаҰҝаҰ№а§ҚаҰЁ` and retains `Enter`/`Escape`. [Source](https://support.google.com/accessibility/answer/6101541?co=GENIE.Platform%3DDesktop&hl=bn) Caller evidence: C7; established UI. | verified |
| `F-bn-011` | `bn` | `a11y.navigationModeExited` | event state | `"аҰЁа§ҮаҰӯаҰҝаҰ—а§ҮаҰ¶аҰЁ аҰ®а§ӢаҰЎ аҰҘа§ҮаҰ•а§Ү аҰ¬а§ҮаҰ°аҰҝаҰҜаҰја§Ү аҰҶаҰёаҰҫ аҰ№аҰҜаҰја§ҮаҰӣа§Ү"` | `"аҰЁа§ҮаҰӯаҰҝаҰ—а§ҮаҰ¶аҰЁ аҰ®а§ӢаҰЎ аҰҘа§ҮаҰ•а§Ү аҰ¬а§ҮаҰ° аҰ№аҰҜаҰја§ҮаҰӣа§ҮаҰЁ"` | Live-region completion should address the user naturally. Caller evidence: C7; CTX. | verified |
| `F-bn-012` | `bn` | `a11y.navigatedToBlock` | event state | `"аҰ¬а§ҚаҰІаҰ•а§Ү аҰЁа§ҮаҰӯаҰҝаҰ—а§ҮаҰҹ аҰ•аҰ°аҰҫ аҰ№аҰҜаҰја§ҮаҰӣа§Ү"` | `"аҰ¬а§ҚаҰІаҰ•а§Ү аҰӘа§ҢаҰҒаҰӣа§ҮаҰӣа§ҮаҰЁ"` | Removes an impersonal transliteration from a completed navigation announcement. Caller evidence: C7; CTX. | verified |
| `F-bn-013` | `bn` | `a11y.textFormatting` | terminology | `"аҰҹа§ҮаҰ•а§ҚаҰёаҰҹ аҰ«аҰ°аҰ®а§ҚаҰҜаҰҫаҰҹаҰҝаҰӮ"` | `"аҰІа§ҮаҰ–аҰҫаҰ° аҰ¬аҰҝаҰЁа§ҚаҰҜаҰҫаҰё"` | Native term matches the established `аҰ¬аҰҝаҰЁа§ҚаҰҜаҰҫаҰё аҰ…аҰӘаҰёаҰҫаҰ°аҰЈ` formatter terminology. Caller evidence: C7; INT. | verified |
| `F-bn-014` | `bn` | `tools.callout.addEmoji` | wrong scope | `"аҰҮаҰ®а§ӢаҰңаҰҝ аҰҜа§ӢаҰ— аҰ•аҰ°а§ҒаҰЁ"` | `"аҰҶаҰҮаҰ•аҰЁ аҰҜа§ӢаҰ— аҰ•аҰ°а§ҒаҰЁ"` | The control adds the callout icon, not necessarily an emoji-only concept. Caller evidence: C8; EN-023. | verified |
| `F-bn-015` | `bn` | `tools.callout.filterEmojis` | wrong action | `"аҰ«аҰҝаҰІа§ҚаҰҹаҰҫаҰ°вҖҰ"` | `"аҰҮаҰ®а§ӢаҰңаҰҝ аҰ–а§ҒаҰҒаҰңа§ҒаҰЁвҖҰ"` | This is the emoji searchbox placeholder and accessible name. Caller evidence: C8; EN-024. | verified |
| `F-bn-016` | `bn` | `tools.callout.pickRandom` | truncated action | `"аҰҸаҰІа§ӢаҰ®а§ҮаҰІа§Ӣ"` | `"аҰҸаҰ•аҰҹаҰҝ аҰҸаҰІа§ӢаҰ®а§ҮаҰІа§Ӣ аҰҮаҰ®а§ӢаҰңаҰҝ аҰ¬а§ҮаҰӣа§Ү аҰЁаҰҝаҰЁ"` | Current adjective omits both the action and object. Caller evidence: C8; EN-025. | verified |
| `F-bn-017` | `bn` | `tools.database.cardMenuLabel` | accessibility grammar | `"аҰ•аҰҫаҰ°а§ҚаҰЎ аҰ¬аҰҝаҰ•аҰІа§ҚаҰӘ"` | `"аҰ•аҰҫаҰ°а§ҚаҰЎа§ҮаҰ° аҰ¬аҰҝаҰ•аҰІа§ҚаҰӘ"` | Adds the required possessive relationship for the card menu label. Caller evidence: C9; CTX. | verified |
| `F-bn-018` | `bn` | `tools.database.cardTitlePlaceholder` | consistency | `"аҰ–аҰҫаҰІаҰҝ аҰӘаҰҫаҰӨаҰҫ"` | `"аҰ–аҰҫаҰІаҰҝ аҰӘа§ғаҰ·а§ҚаҰ аҰҫ"` | Identical English `rowTitlePlaceholder` already uses `аҰ–аҰҫаҰІаҰҝ аҰӘа§ғаҰ·а§ҚаҰ аҰҫ`. Caller evidence: C9; INT. | verified |
| `F-bn-019` | `bn` | `toolNames.inlineCode` | tool distinction / established technical terminology | `"аҰ•а§ӢаҰЎ"` | `"аҰҮаҰЁаҰІаҰҫаҰҮаҰЁ аҰ•а§ӢаҰЎ"` | The inline formatter and separate code-block tool exposed the same title. Bengali Markdown guidance explicitly contrasts [`аҰҮаҰЁаҰІаҰҫаҰҮаҰЁ аҰ•а§ӢаҰЎ`](https://www.markdownlang.com/bn/cheatsheet/#аҰ•а§ӢаҰЎ) with `аҰ•а§ӢаҰЎ аҰ¬а§ҚаҰІаҰ•`, so the replacement preserves the caller distinction. | verified |
| `F-bn-020` | `bn` | `toolNames.equation` | untranslated | `"Equation"` | `"аҰёаҰ®а§ҖаҰ•аҰ°аҰЈ"` | Visible tool name remains English. Caller evidence: C10; EX. | verified |
| `F-bn-021` | `bn` | `tools.equation.placeholder` | untranslated | `"Enter a LaTeX formulaвҖҰ"` | `"аҰҸаҰ•аҰҹаҰҝ LaTeX аҰёа§ӮаҰӨа§ҚаҰ° аҰІаҰҝаҰ–а§ҒаҰЁвҖҰ"` | Visible input placeholder remains English; `LaTeX` is correctly retained. Caller evidence: C10; EX. | verified |
| `F-bn-022` | `bn` | `tools.code.searchLanguage` | punctuation | `"аҰӯаҰҫаҰ·аҰҫ аҰ–а§ҒаҰҒаҰңа§ҒаҰЁ..."` | `"аҰӯаҰҫаҰ·аҰҫ аҰ–а§ҒаҰҒаҰңа§ҒаҰЁвҖҰ"` | Replaces three periods with the corpus-standard ellipsis character. Caller evidence: C10; EN-026. | verified |
| `F-bn-023` | `bn` | `tools.link.linkTitle` | wrong field meaning | `"аҰІаҰҝаҰҷа§ҚаҰ•а§ҮаҰ° аҰ¶аҰҝаҰ°а§ӢаҰЁаҰҫаҰ®"` | `"аҰІаҰҝаҰҷа§ҚаҰ•а§ҮаҰ° аҰІа§ҮаҰ–аҰҫ"` | Field edits visible anchor text, not title metadata. Caller evidence: C11; EN-027. | verified |
| `F-bn-024` | `bn` | `tools.image.converting` | untranslated | `"ConvertingвҖҰ"` | `"аҰ°а§ӮаҰӘаҰҫаҰЁа§ҚаҰӨаҰ° аҰ№аҰҡа§ҚаҰӣа§ҮвҖҰ"` | Visible progress label remains English. Caller evidence: C12; EX. | verified |
| `F-bn-025` | `bn` | `tools.image.altEdit` | abbreviation/action consistency | `"alt аҰҹа§ҮаҰ•а§ҚаҰёаҰҹ аҰёаҰ®а§ҚаҰӘаҰҫаҰҰаҰЁаҰҫ"` | `"Alt аҰҹа§ҮаҰ•а§ҚаҰёаҰҹ аҰёаҰ®а§ҚаҰӘаҰҫаҰҰаҰЁаҰҫ аҰ•аҰ°а§ҒаҰЁ"` | Restores established `Alt` capitalization and a direct edit action. Caller evidence: C12; INT. | verified |
| `F-bn-026` | `bn` | `tools.image.altDescription` | accessibility brevity | `"аҰҸаҰҮ аҰӣаҰ¬аҰҝаҰ•а§Ү аҰ¬аҰ°а§ҚаҰЈаҰЁаҰҫ аҰ•аҰ°аҰӨа§Ү alt аҰҹа§ҮаҰ•а§ҚаҰёаҰҹ аҰҜа§ӢаҰ— аҰ•аҰ°а§ҒаҰЁаҘӨ аҰҸаҰҹаҰҝ аҰҶаҰӘаҰЁаҰҫаҰ° аҰӘа§ҮаҰңаҰ•а§Ү аҰҰа§ғаҰ·а§ҚаҰҹаҰҝаҰӘа§ҚаҰ°аҰӨаҰҝаҰ¬аҰЁа§ҚаҰ§а§Җ аҰ¬аҰҫ аҰ…аҰЁа§ҚаҰ§ аҰ®аҰҫаҰЁа§ҒаҰ·а§ҮаҰ° аҰңаҰЁа§ҚаҰҜ аҰҶаҰ°аҰ“ аҰ…а§ҚаҰҜаҰҫаҰ•а§ҚаҰёа§ҮаҰёаҰҜа§ӢаҰ—а§ҚаҰҜ аҰ•аҰ°а§Ү аҰӨа§ӢаҰІа§ҮаҘӨ"` | `"аҰҜаҰҫаҰҒаҰ°аҰҫ аҰӣаҰ¬аҰҝаҰҹаҰҝ аҰҰа§ҮаҰ–аҰӨа§Ү аҰӘаҰҫаҰ°а§ҮаҰЁ аҰЁаҰҫ, аҰӨаҰҫаҰҒаҰҰа§ҮаҰ° аҰңаҰЁа§ҚаҰҜ аҰҸаҰҹаҰҝ аҰ¬аҰ°а§ҚаҰЈаҰЁаҰҫ аҰ•аҰ°а§ҒаҰЁаҘӨ"` | Current copy is stale, verbose, and less user-centered than the corrected source. Caller evidence: C12; EN-028. | verified |
| `F-bn-027` | `bn` | `tools.image.previewControls` | ARIA scope | `"аҰӘа§ҚаҰ°аҰҝаҰӯаҰҝаҰү аҰЁаҰҝаҰҜаҰјаҰЁа§ҚаҰӨа§ҚаҰ°аҰЈ"` | `"аҰӣаҰ¬аҰҝаҰ° аҰӘа§ҚаҰ°аҰҝаҰӯаҰҝаҰү аҰЁаҰҝаҰҜаҰјаҰЁа§ҚаҰӨа§ҚаҰ°аҰЈ"` | Accessible region name omits that the controls operate the image preview. Caller evidence: C12; CTX. | verified |
| `F-bn-028` | `bn` | `tools.image.errorFileTooLarge` | untranslated error | `"Image is too large. {size} exceeds the {max} limit."` | `"аҰӣаҰ¬аҰҝаҰҹаҰҝ аҰ–а§ҒаҰ¬ аҰ¬аҰЎаҰјаҘӨ аҰҶаҰ•аҰҫаҰ° {size}; аҰёаҰ°а§ҚаҰ¬а§ӢаҰҡа§ҚаҰҡ {max}аҘӨ"` | Entire error remains English. Caller evidence: C13; EX. | verified |
| `F-bn-029` | `bn` | `tools.image.errorDefaultMessage` | error accuracy | `"URL аҰҸаҰ•аҰҹаҰҝ аҰӨа§ҚаҰ°а§ҒаҰҹаҰҝ аҰ«аҰҝаҰ°аҰҝаҰҜаҰја§ҮаҰӣа§ҮаҘӨ аҰ…аҰЁа§ҚаҰҜ аҰүа§ҺаҰё аҰҡа§ҮаҰ·а§ҚаҰҹаҰҫ аҰ•аҰ°а§ҒаҰЁ аҰ¬аҰҫ аҰ«аҰҫаҰҮаҰІаҰҹаҰҝ аҰӘа§ҒаҰЁаҰ°аҰҫаҰҜаҰј аҰҶаҰӘаҰІа§ӢаҰЎ аҰ•аҰ°а§ҒаҰЁаҘӨ"` | `"аҰҸаҰҮ URL аҰҘа§ҮаҰ•а§Ү аҰӣаҰ¬аҰҝаҰҹаҰҝ аҰІа§ӢаҰЎ аҰ•аҰ°аҰҫ аҰҜаҰҫаҰҜаҰјаҰЁаҰҝаҘӨ аҰ…аҰЁа§ҚаҰҜ аҰүа§ҺаҰё аҰ¬а§ҚаҰҜаҰ¬аҰ№аҰҫаҰ° аҰ•аҰ°а§ҒаҰЁ аҰ…аҰҘаҰ¬аҰҫ аҰ«аҰҫаҰҮаҰІаҰҹаҰҝ аҰҶаҰ¬аҰҫаҰ° аҰҶаҰӘаҰІа§ӢаҰЎ аҰ•аҰ°а§ҒаҰЁаҘӨ"` | A URL does not itself вҖңreturnвҖқ the user-facing error; identify the failed image load. Caller evidence: C12; EN-040. | verified |
| `F-bn-030` | `bn` | `tools.image.cropRatioFree` | option meaning | `"аҰ®а§ҒаҰ•а§ҚаҰӨ"` | `"аҰҮаҰҡа§ҚаҰӣа§ҮаҰ®аҰӨа§Ӣ"` | `аҰ®а§ҒаҰ•а§ҚаҰӨ` means liberated/free; this option means unconstrained, user-chosen crop shape. Caller evidence: C14; CTX. | verified |
| `F-bn-031` | `bn` | `tools.image.cropRatio1to1` | numeral localization | `"1:1"` | `"а§§:а§§"` | Bengali UI and official Bengali product guidance use Bengali static digits for ratios. [Source](https://support.google.com/youtube/answer/7124474?co=GENIE.Platform%3DAndroid&hl=bn) Caller evidence: C14; exact challenge. | verified |
| `F-bn-032` | `bn` | `tools.image.cropRatio4to3` | numeral localization | `"4:3"` | `"а§Ә:а§©"` | Bengali static digits are required for locale consistency. [Source](https://support.google.com/youtube/answer/4603579?hl=bn) Caller evidence: C14; exact challenge. | verified |
| `F-bn-033` | `bn` | `tools.image.cropRatio16to9` | numeral localization | `"16:9"` | `"а§§а§¬:а§Ҝ"` | Bengali static digits are required for locale consistency. [Source](https://support.google.com/youtube/answer/4603579?hl=bn) Caller evidence: C14; exact challenge. | verified |
| `F-bn-034` | `bn` | `tools.file.errorFileTooLarge` | untranslated error | `"File is too large. {size} exceeds the {max} limit."` | `"аҰ«аҰҫаҰҮаҰІаҰҹаҰҝ аҰ–а§ҒаҰ¬ аҰ¬аҰЎаҰјаҘӨ аҰҶаҰ•аҰҫаҰ° {size}; аҰёаҰ°а§ҚаҰ¬а§ӢаҰҡа§ҚаҰҡ {max}аҘӨ"` | Entire error remains English. Caller evidence: C13; EX. | verified |
| `F-bn-035` | `bn` | `tools.video.alignmentLeft` | action scope | `"аҰ¬аҰҫаҰ®"` | `"аҰ¬аҰҫаҰ®а§Ү аҰёаҰҫаҰ°аҰҝаҰ¬аҰҰа§ҚаҰ§ аҰ•аҰ°а§ҒаҰЁ"` | Single menu item performs alignment; unlike image state labels, it has no separate action label. Caller evidence: C15; CTX. | verified |
| `F-bn-036` | `bn` | `tools.video.alignmentCenter` | action scope | `"аҰ®аҰҫаҰқа§Ү"` | `"аҰ®аҰҫаҰқаҰ–аҰҫаҰЁа§Ү аҰёаҰҫаҰ°аҰҝаҰ¬аҰҰа§ҚаҰ§ аҰ•аҰ°а§ҒаҰЁ"` | Current value names only a position, not the menu action. Caller evidence: C15; CTX. | verified |
| `F-bn-037` | `bn` | `tools.video.alignmentRight` | action scope | `"аҰЎаҰҫаҰЁ"` | `"аҰЎаҰҫаҰЁа§Ү аҰёаҰҫаҰ°аҰҝаҰ¬аҰҰа§ҚаҰ§ аҰ•аҰ°а§ҒаҰЁ"` | Current value names only a position, not the menu action. Caller evidence: C15; CTX. | verified |
| `F-bn-038` | `bn` | `tools.video.errorFileTooLarge` | untranslated error | `"Video is too large. {size} exceeds the {max} limit."` | `"аҰӯаҰҝаҰЎаҰҝаҰ“аҰҹаҰҝ аҰ–а§ҒаҰ¬ аҰ¬аҰЎаҰјаҘӨ аҰҶаҰ•аҰҫаҰ° {size}; аҰёаҰ°а§ҚаҰ¬а§ӢаҰҡа§ҚаҰҡ {max}аҘӨ"` | Entire error remains English. | `F-bn-056` | `bn` | `tools.video.seek` | accessibility jargon | `"аҰёаҰҝаҰ• аҰ•аҰ°а§ҒаҰЁ"` | `"аҰӘа§ҚаҰІа§ҮаҰ¬а§ҚаҰҜаҰҫаҰ•а§ҮаҰ° аҰ…аҰ¬аҰёа§ҚаҰҘаҰҫаҰЁ"` | This is the range inputвҖҷs ARIA label; transliterated вҖңseekвҖқ is unclear. Caller evidence: C21; CTX. | verified |

Caller evidence: C21; EN-034. | verified |

| `F-bn-062` | `bn` | `tools.colorPicker.defaultSwatchLabel` | caller composition / accessible label-value relation | `"{mode} {default}"` | `"{mode}: {default}"` | The now-live formatter produced ambiguous bare adjacency such as `аҰІа§ҮаҰ–аҰҫаҰ° аҰ°аҰҷ аҰЎаҰҝаҰ«аҰІа§ҚаҰҹ`. The colon creates a clear mode/value label and follows the localeвҖҷs existing count-neutral UI label pattern. | verified |
| `F-bn-063` | `bn` | `tools.colorPicker.colorSwatchLabel` | caller composition / accessible label-value relation | `"{mode} {color}"` | `"{mode}: {color}"` | All 18 named-color commands need the same explicit relationship; the replacement produces standalone labels such as `аҰІа§ҮаҰ–аҰҫаҰ° аҰ°аҰҷ: аҰІаҰҫаҰІ` while preserving both runtime placeholders. | verified |
| `F-bn-064` | `bn` | `searchTerms.number` | search alias / numbered-list semantics | `"аҰёаҰӮаҰ–а§ҚаҰҜаҰҫ"` | `"аҰёаҰӮаҰ–а§ҚаҰҜаҰҫаҰҜаҰјаҰЁ"` | This alias belongs only to the numbered-list search group. `аҰёаҰӮаҰ–а§ҚаҰҜаҰҫ` is a generic number noun, while official [LibreOffice Bengali list guidance](https://help.libreoffice.org/latest/bn/text/swriter/guide/using_numbering.html) uses `аҰёаҰӮаҰ–а§ҚаҰҜаҰҫаҰҜаҰјаҰЁ` for the editor operation. | verified |
| `F-bn-065` | `bn` | `tools.image.alignmentCenterAria` | action terminology / sibling consistency | `"аҰ®аҰҫаҰқа§Ү аҰёаҰҫаҰ°аҰҝаҰ¬аҰҰа§ҚаҰ§ аҰ•аҰ°а§ҒаҰЁ"` | `"аҰ®аҰҫаҰқаҰ–аҰҫаҰЁа§Ү аҰёаҰҫаҰ°аҰҝаҰ¬аҰҰа§ҚаҰ§ аҰ•аҰ°а§ҒаҰЁ"` | The image and embed control performs the same center-alignment action as the already-reviewed video and audio callers; the replacement makes all three live actions consistent. | verified |
| `F-bn-066` | `bn` | `tools.image.downloadOriginal` | action grammar / object clarity | `"аҰ®а§ӮаҰІ аҰЎаҰҫаҰүаҰЁаҰІа§ӢаҰЎ"` | `"аҰҶаҰёаҰІ аҰӣаҰ¬аҰҝ аҰЎаҰҫаҰүаҰЁаҰІа§ӢаҰЎ аҰ•аҰ°а§ҒаҰЁ"` | The old noun fragment could mean a primary download and omitted what is downloaded. The replacement is a complete imperative naming the uncropped original image. | verified |
| `F-bn-067` | `bn` | `tools.image.navigationControls` | accessibility / navigation relationship | `"аҰӣаҰ¬аҰҝ аҰЁа§ҮаҰӯаҰҝаҰ—а§ҮаҰ¶аҰЁ"` | `"аҰӣаҰ¬аҰҝаҰ—а§ҒаҰІа§ӢаҰ° аҰ®аҰ§а§ҚаҰҜа§Ү аҰЁа§ҮаҰӯаҰҝаҰ—а§ҮаҰ¶аҰЁ"` | The ARIA group contains previous-image and next-image controls. `аҰӣаҰ¬аҰҝаҰ—а§ҒаҰІа§ӢаҰ° аҰ®аҰ§а§ҚаҰҜа§Ү` states navigation among multiple images and matches the localeвҖҷs reviewed block-navigation construction. | verified |
| `F-bn-068` | `bn` | `tools.audio.emptyOrDropHere` | drop-target object clarity | `"аҰ…аҰҘаҰ¬аҰҫ аҰҸаҰ–аҰҫаҰЁа§Ү аҰ…аҰЎаҰҝаҰ“ аҰ«а§ҮаҰІа§ҒаҰЁ"` | `"аҰ…аҰҘаҰ¬аҰҫ аҰҸаҰ–аҰҫаҰЁа§Ү аҰ…аҰЎаҰҝаҰ“ аҰ«аҰҫаҰҮаҰІ аҰ«а§ҮаҰІа§ҒаҰЁ"` | The drop target accepts a file, not abstract audio. Official [Files by Google Bengali help](https://support.google.com/files/answer/10018943?hl=bn) uses the exact product term `аҰ…аҰЎаҰҝаҰ“ аҰ«аҰҫаҰҮаҰІ`. | verified |
| `F-bn-069` | `bn` | `blockSettings.blocksSelected` | number grammar / classifier | `"{count} аҰ¬а§ҚаҰІаҰ•"` | `"{count}аҰҹаҰҝ аҰ¬а§ҚаҰІаҰ•"` | This dynamic selected-block count requires the Bengali classifier `аҰҹаҰҝ`; the replacement matches every sibling block-count announcement and standard Bengali numeralвҖ“noun construction. Evidence: [Unicode CLDR Bengali number verification](https://www.unicode.org/cldr/cldr-aux/charts/28/verify/numbers/bn.html); [Google Android accessibility guidance](https://support.google.com/accessibility/android/answer/6151854?hl=bn). | verified |
| `F-bn-070` | `bn` | `a11y.blocksDuplicated` | caller semantics / accessibility | `"{count}аҰҹаҰҝ аҰ¬а§ҚаҰІаҰ• {position} аҰ…аҰ¬аҰёа§ҚаҰҘаҰҫаҰЁ аҰҘа§ҮаҰ•а§Ү аҰ•аҰӘаҰҝ аҰ•аҰ°аҰҫ аҰ№аҰҜаҰја§ҮаҰӣа§Ү"` | `"{count}аҰҹаҰҝ аҰ¬а§ҚаҰІаҰ• аҰ•аҰӘаҰҝ аҰ•аҰ°аҰҫ аҰ№аҰҜаҰја§ҮаҰӣа§ҮаҘӨ аҰ¶а§ҒаҰ°а§ҒаҰ° аҰ…аҰ¬аҰёа§ҚаҰҘаҰҫаҰЁ: {position}"` | The drag-a11y caller passes the first newly duplicated block's destination index as `{position}`, not the source position. The replacement announces the completed duplication and labels the new duplicates' starting position without reversing that relationship. | verified |
| `F-bn-071` | `bn` | `tools.image.errorSourceOffline` | natural error copy / resource state | `"аҰүа§ҺаҰё аҰ«аҰҫаҰҮаҰІаҰҹаҰҝ аҰёаҰ°аҰҫаҰЁа§Ӣ аҰ№аҰҜаҰја§Ү аҰҘаҰҫаҰ•аҰӨа§Ү аҰӘаҰҫаҰ°а§Ү аҰ¬аҰҫ аҰ…аҰ«аҰІаҰҫаҰҮаҰЁ аҰ№аҰӨа§Ү аҰӘаҰҫаҰ°а§ҮаҘӨ"` | `"аҰүа§ҺаҰё аҰ«аҰҫаҰҮаҰІаҰҹаҰҝ аҰёаҰ°аҰҫаҰЁа§Ӣ аҰ№аҰҜаҰја§Ү аҰҘаҰҫаҰ•аҰӨа§Ү аҰӘаҰҫаҰ°а§Ү аҰ¬аҰҫ аҰ…аҰЁа§ҒаҰӘаҰІаҰ¬а§ҚаҰ§ аҰ№аҰӨа§Ү аҰӘаҰҫаҰ°а§ҮаҘӨ"` | A file is not naturally described as being offline. The broken-image caller needs the broader moved-or-unavailable source state, and `аҰ…аҰЁа§ҒаҰӘаҰІаҰ¬а§ҚаҰ§` matches the locale's existing image-unavailable terminology. | verified |
| `F-bn-072` | `bn` | `a11y.allBlocksSelected` | accessibility / count neutrality | `"аҰёаҰ¬ аҰ¬а§ҚаҰІаҰ• аҰЁаҰҝаҰ°а§ҚаҰ¬аҰҫаҰҡаҰҝаҰӨ аҰ№аҰҜаҰја§ҮаҰӣа§Ү, {count}аҰҹаҰҝ аҰ¬а§ҚаҰІаҰ•"` | `"аҰёаҰ¬ аҰ¬а§ҚаҰІаҰ• аҰЁаҰҝаҰ°а§ҚаҰ¬аҰҫаҰҡаҰҝаҰӨ аҰ№аҰҜаҰја§ҮаҰӣа§ҮаҘӨ аҰ®а§ӢаҰҹ: {count}"` | The select-all live-region caller can receive one or many blocks. Separating the completion from a noun-free total avoids count-sensitive repetition and matches the corrected source contract. | verified |
| `F-bn-073` | `bn` | `blockSettings.clickAction` | caller composition / connective grammar | `"аҰ•а§ҚаҰІаҰҝаҰ• аҰ•аҰ°а§ҒаҰЁ"` | `"аҰҸаҰ•аҰҹаҰҝ аҰ•а§ҚаҰІаҰҝаҰ•"` | This fragment begins both composed menu-opening instructions. A finite imperative cannot connect naturally to the following `аҰҰаҰҝаҰҜаҰја§Ү` or `аҰ•аҰ°а§Ү`; the noun phrase produces grammatical single-click instructions. | verified |
| `F-bn-074` | `bn` | `blockSettings.orConjunction` | caller composition / shortcut clarity | `" аҰ…аҰҘаҰ¬аҰҫ аҰҸаҰҮ аҰ¶аҰ°а§ҚаҰҹаҰ•аҰҫаҰҹ аҰ¬а§ҚаҰҜаҰ¬аҰ№аҰҫаҰ° аҰ•аҰ°а§ҒаҰЁ: "` | `" аҰ•аҰ°а§Ү аҰ…аҰҘаҰ¬аҰҫ аҰ•а§ҖаҰ¬а§ӢаҰ°а§ҚаҰЎ аҰ¶аҰ°а§ҚаҰҹаҰ•аҰҫаҰҹ "` | The caller places this fragment between the click phrase and the literal shortcut. The replacement supplies the Bengali connective and identifies the following token as a keyboard shortcut without embedding an incompatible imperative. | verified |
| `F-bn-075` | `bn` | `blockSettings.openMenuAction` | caller composition / complete instruction | `" аҰ®а§ҮаҰЁа§Ғ аҰ–а§ҒаҰІаҰӨа§Ү"` | `" аҰҰаҰҝаҰҜаҰја§Ү аҰ®а§ҮаҰЁа§Ғ аҰ–а§ҒаҰІа§ҒаҰЁ"` | This fragment closes both composed instructions. The replacement turns the trailing infinitive into a complete imperative and supplies the instrumental connective required after either the click or shortcut phrase. | verified |
| `F-bn-076` | `bn` | `a11y.dragHandle` | action clarity / accessibility | `"аҰ¬а§ҚаҰІаҰ• аҰёаҰ°аҰҫаҰӨа§Ү аҰҹаҰҫаҰЁа§ҒаҰЁ аҰ¬аҰҫ аҰ®а§ҮаҰЁа§ҒаҰ° аҰңаҰЁа§ҚаҰҜ аҰ•а§ҚаҰІаҰҝаҰ• аҰ•аҰ°а§ҒаҰЁ"` | `"аҰ¬а§ҚаҰІаҰ• аҰёаҰ°аҰҫаҰӨа§Ү аҰҹаҰҫаҰЁа§ҒаҰЁ аҰ¬аҰҫ аҰ®а§ҮаҰЁа§Ғ аҰ–а§ҒаҰІаҰӨа§Ү аҰ•а§ҚаҰІаҰҝаҰ• аҰ•аҰ°а§ҒаҰЁ"` | The drag-handle button opens the block menu when clicked. Naming that action directly is clearer than the vague вҖңclick for the menuвҖқ construction. | verified |
| `F-bn-077` | `bn` | `tools.video.seekValueText` | numeric suffix attachment / accessibility | `"{total} аҰҸаҰ° аҰ®аҰ§а§ҚаҰҜа§Ү {current}"` | `"{total}-аҰҸаҰ° аҰ®аҰ§а§ҚаҰҜа§Ү {current}"` | The video seek caller interpolates Latin-digit `M:SS` values into this slider `aria-valuetext`. Bengali attaches the genitive suffix to numeric or non-Bengali tokens with a hyphen; GoogleвҖҷs Bengali progress UI uses the exact pattern [`5-аҰҸаҰ° аҰ®аҰ§а§ҚаҰҜа§Ү 1`](https://support.google.com/files/answer/9765316?hl=bn). | verified |
| `F-bn-078` | `bn` | `a11y.dropPosition` | numeric ordinal semantics / accessibility | `"{total}аҰҹаҰҝаҰ° аҰ®аҰ§а§ҚаҰҜа§Ү {position} аҰ…аҰ¬аҰёа§ҚаҰҘаҰҫаҰЁа§Ү аҰ°аҰҫаҰ–аҰҫ аҰ№аҰ¬а§Ү"` | `"{total}аҰҹаҰҝаҰ° аҰ®аҰ§а§ҚаҰҜа§Ү {position} аҰЁаҰ®а§ҚаҰ¬аҰ° аҰ…аҰ¬аҰёа§ҚаҰҘаҰҫаҰЁа§Ү аҰ°аҰҫаҰ–аҰҫ аҰ№аҰ¬а§Ү"` | The polite drag announcement receives one-based numeric `position` and numeric `total`; the bare cardinal can read as a count of positions rather than вҖңposition 3.вҖқ BangladeshвҖҷs Press Information Department uses [`аҰҸаҰ• аҰЁаҰ®а§ҚаҰ¬аҰ° аҰ…аҰ¬аҰёа§ҚаҰҘаҰҫаҰЁа§Ү`](https://pressinform.gov.bd/site/allnotes/cbadeb77-c1c0-4e3e-b102-1b1ea0cb35ae), explicitly marking the numeric position with `аҰЁаҰ®а§ҚаҰ¬аҰ°`. | verified |

| `F-bs-179` | `bs` | `toolNames.inlineCode` | tool distinction / established product terminology | `"Kod"` | `"Umetnuti kod"` | The inline formatter and separate code-block tool exposed the same title. The official [WordPress Bosnian translation catalog](https://translate.wordpress.org/projects/wp/dev/bs/default/export-translations/?format=json) translates вҖңInline codeвҖқ as `Umetnuti kod`, which distinguishes the two tools while retaining a two-word toolbox label. | verified |
| `F-bs-180` | `bs` | `tools.image.navigationControls` | accessibility / navigation relationship | `"Navigacija slikama"` | `"Navigacija izmeД‘u slika"` | This ARIA group contains previous-image and next-image controls. `izmeД‘u slika` states movement among images directly instead of leaving the relationship underspecified. | verified |
| `F-bs-181` | `bs` | `tools.video.seek` | accessibility / media-control semantics | `"Premotavanje"` | `"Pozicija reprodukcije"` | The value labels a range whose value is the current playback position, not a rewind operation. The [W3C seek-slider pattern](https://www.w3.org/WAI/ARIA/apg/patterns/slider/examples/slider-seek/) defines that caller contract, and University of Zagreb/SRCE media guidance uses [`pozicija reprodukcije`](https://www.srce.unizg.hr/sites/default/files/edu/multimedia/r701_polaznik.pdf) for the same concept. | verified |
| `F-bs-182` | `bs` | `tools.image.errorSourceOffline` | natural error copy / resource availability | `"Izvorna datoteka je moЕҫda premjeЕЎtena ili nije na mreЕҫi."` | `"Izvorna datoteka je moЕҫda premjeЕЎtena ili viЕЎe nije dostupna."` | The broken-image caller knows only that a remote image resource repeatedly failed to load, not that the file is literally вҖңoff the network.вҖқ The replacement states the user-relevant moved-or-unavailable condition; official regional product copy likewise uses [`viЕЎe nije dostupna`](https://support.microsoft.com/sr-latn-rs/office/opcija-odbaci-vi%C5%A1e-nije-dostupna-za-pominjanja-i-reakcije-u-oknu-obave%C5%A1tenja-programa-outlook-9f8df9f8-3b4c-4280-9181-038a94bfae65) for an unavailable state. | verified |
| `F-cs-001` | `cs` | `toolNames.clearFormat` | missing key / source coverage | `missing` | `"Vymazat formГЎtovГЎnГӯ"` | MicrosoftвҖҷs Czech Word instructions name the concise command [Vymazat formГЎtovГЎnГӯ](https://support.microsoft.com/cs-cz/office/form%C3%A1tov%C3%A1n%C3%AD-dokumentu-aplikace-word-fb9ef2d6-e2ad-4721-abc1-55f88864617f). | verified |

| `F-cs-108` | `cs` | `a11y.atTop` | accessibility / count neutrality / shared single/group selection | `"Blok je na zaДҚГЎtku, nelze pЕҷesunout vГҪЕЎe"` | `"Nelze pЕҷesunout vГҪЕЎe. | `F-cs-120` | `cs` | `blockSettings.clickAction` | fragment composition / grammar | `"KliknДӣte"` | `"KliknutГӯm"` | In read-only mode this fragment composes with `openMenuAction`; in editable mode it precedes the alternative shortcut. | `F-cs-122` | `cs` | `blockSettings.openMenuAction` | fragment composition / grammar | `" pro otevЕҷenГӯ nabГӯdky"` | `" otevЕҷete nabГӯdku"` | Combined with `clickAction` and the optional shortcut fragment, the predicate produces natural Czech in both read-only and editable tooltip variants while preserving its leading space. | verified |

| `F-da-074` | `da` | `a11y.dropCreateColumnRight` | event timing / accessibility | `"Opretter en kolonne til hГёjre"` | `"Der oprettes en kolonne til hГёjre"` | The live-region message describes the prospective drop result, not an action already in progress; the passive future-result wording preserves that timing without an omitted subject. | verified |

| `F-da-076` | `da` | `tools.image.errorDefaultMessage` | natural error copy / source synchronization | `"URLвҖҷen returnerede en fejl. | `F-da-077` | `da` | `tools.image.previewControls` | accessibility / object context | `"Kontrolknapper til forhГҘndsvisning"` | `"Kontrolelementer til forhГҘndsvisning af billede"` | The image-preview toolbar contains several controls; Microsoft Danish UI terminology uses `kontrolelementer`, and the accessible name must identify the image object rather than a generic preview. | verified |
| `F-da-078` | `da` | `a11y.navigationModeEntered` | platform terminology / accessibility | `"Navigationstilstand. Brug piletasterne til at flytte mellem blokke, Enter for at redigere og Esc for at afslutte."` | The assertive live-region instruction names the physical key; AppleвҖҷs Danish keyboard guidance uses `Esc` and `Esc-tasten`. | verified |
| `F-da-079` | `da` | `a11y.blocksDuplicated` | event semantics / accessibility | `"{count} blokke duplikeret fra position {position}"` | `"{count} blokke duplikeret med start pГҘ position {position}"` | The caller passes the destination index of the new duplicated run, not its source position; the replacement describes that start position without changing either placeholder. | verified |
| `F-da-080` | `da` | `tools.image.cancelUpload` | established product terminology / consistency | `"AnnullГ©r upload"` | `"Annuller upload"` | Current Microsoft and Apple Danish interfaces use unaccented `Annuller`; this also matches the retained notifier action. | verified |
| `F-da-081` | `da` | `tools.image.cropCancel` | established product terminology / consistency | `"AnnullГ©r"` | `"Annuller"` | Current Microsoft and Apple Danish interfaces use unaccented `Annuller`; the image-crop action should match the rest of the cancellation family. | verified |
| `F-da-082` | `da` | `tools.file.cancelUpload` | established product terminology / consistency | `"AnnullГ©r upload"` | `"Annuller upload"` | Current Microsoft and Apple Danish interfaces use unaccented `Annuller`; the file-upload action should match the image-upload and notifier actions. | verified |
| `F-da-083` | `da` | `tools.image.altEdit` | established product terminology / consistency | `"RedigГ©r alt-tekst"` | `"Rediger alt-tekst"` | MicrosoftвҖҷs Danish alternative-text UI uses unaccented `Rediger`, matching the existing callout, database, and link edit actions. | verified |
| `F-da-084` | `da` | `tools.colorPicker.defaultSwatchLabel` | caller context / compound orthography | `"{default} {mode}"` | `"{default}{mode}"` | The newly live slash-menu caller exposed `Standard tekstfarve` and `Standard baggrund`; Danish uses `standard` as the first element of a [compound](https://ordnet.dk/ddo/ordbog/standard), so concatenating the preserved placeholders produces `Standardtekstfarve` and `Standardbaggrund`. | verified |
| `F-da-085` | `da` | `toolNames.inlineCode` | tool distinction / established terminology | `"Kode"` | `"Inline-kode"` | `inline-tool-code.ts` renders the inline formatting title, while the separate code-block tool already uses `Kode`. | `F-da-086` | `da` | `tools.database.cardMenuLabel` | accessibility / caller action-menu semantics | `"Kortindstillinger"` | `"Flere handlinger for kortet"` | The ellipsis button opens an action menu whose current item deletes the card; it does not open a settings surface. MicrosoftвҖҷs Danish screen-reader guidance calls the equivalent ellipsis control [`Knappen Flere handlinger`](https://support.microsoft.com/da-dk/office/brug-en-sk%C3%A6rml%C3%A6ser-til-at-arbejde-med-filer-i-microsoft-365-appen-506364b2-e55b-4b45-adca-9ad22575aac9), and the object makes this standalone accessible name unambiguous. | verified |
| `F-da-087` | `da` | `tools.image.errorSourceOffline` | natural error copy / resource availability | `"Kildefilen kan vГҰre flyttet eller offline."` | `"Kildefilen kan vГҰre flyttet eller ikke lГҰngere tilgГҰngelig."` | The broken-image caller cannot know that a file itself is вҖңofflineвҖқ; it only knows that the remote source no longer loads. MicrosoftвҖҷs Danish source-error guidance uses [`flyttet` and `ikke lГҰngere tilgГҰngelig`](https://support.microsoft.com/da-dk/office/s%C3%A5dan-retter-du-fejlen-connect-fejl-584f7de9-b238-480c-8e8f-de0ba2c1aac9) for this exact moved-or-unavailable relationship. | verified |
| `F-da-088` | `da` | `tools.video.seek` | accessibility / range-control state | `"Spol"` | `"Afspilningsposition"` | This is the accessible name of a range slider whose separate value text announces current and total time, not an imperative button. | `F-hi-043` | `hi` | `tools.image.altDescription` | source synchronization / accessibility | `"аӨҮаӨё аӨӣаӨөаӨҝ аӨ•аӨҫ аӨөаӨ°аҘҚаӨЈаӨЁ аӨ•аӨ°аӨЁаҘҮ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨІаӨҝаӨҸ alt аӨҹаҘҮаӨ•аҘҚаӨёаҘҚаӨҹ аӨңаҘӢаӨЎаӨјаҘҮаӨӮаҘӨ аӨҮаӨёаӨёаҘҮ аӨҶаӨӘаӨ•аӨҫ аӨӘаҘҮаӨң аӨҰаҘғаӨ·аҘҚаӨҹаӨҝаӨ¬аӨҫаӨ§аӨҝаӨӨ аӨҜаӨҫ аӨЁаҘҮаӨӨаҘҚаӨ°аӨ№аҘҖаӨЁ аӨІаҘӢаӨ—аҘӢаӨӮ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨІаӨҝаӨҸ аӨ…аӨ§аӨҝаӨ• аӨёаҘҒаӨІаӨӯ аӨ¬аӨЁаӨӨаӨҫ аӨ№аҘҲаҘӨ"` | `"аӨңаҘӢ аӨІаҘӢаӨ— аӨҮаӨё аӨӣаӨөаӨҝ аӨ•аҘӢ аӨЁаӨ№аҘҖаӨӮ аӨҰаҘҮаӨ– аӨёаӨ•аӨӨаҘҮ, аӨүаӨЁаӨ•аҘҮ аӨІаӨҝаӨҸ аӨҮаӨёаӨ•аӨҫ аӨөаӨ°аҘҚаӨЈаӨЁ аӨ•аӨ°аҘҮаӨӮаҘӨ"` | The corrected source is a concise, user-centered instruction; the replacement accurately addresses people who cannot see the image. | verified |

| `F-hi-049` | `hi` | `tools.image.errorSourceOffline` | natural error copy / resource state | `"аӨёаҘҚаӨ°аҘӢаӨӨ аӨ«аӨјаӨҫаӨҮаӨІ аӨ•аӨ№аҘҖаӨӮ аӨ”аӨ° аӨІаҘҮ аӨңаӨҫаӨҲ аӨ—аӨҲ аӨ№аҘӢ аӨёаӨ•аӨӨаҘҖ аӨ№аҘҲ аӨҜаӨҫ аӨ‘аӨ«аӨјаӨІаӨҫаӨҮаӨЁ аӨ№аҘӢ аӨёаӨ•аӨӨаҘҖ аӨ№аҘҲаҘӨ"` | `"аӨ№аҘӢ аӨёаӨ•аӨӨаӨҫ аӨ№аҘҲ аӨ•аӨҝ аӨёаҘҚаӨ°аҘӢаӨӨ аӨ«аӨјаӨҫаӨҮаӨІ аӨ•аҘӢ аӨ•аӨ№аҘҖаӨӮ аӨ”аӨ° аӨІаҘҮ аӨңаӨҫаӨҜаӨҫ аӨ—аӨҜаӨҫ аӨ№аҘӢ аӨҜаӨҫ аӨөаӨ№ аӨүаӨӘаӨІаӨ¬аҘҚаӨ§ аӨЁ аӨ№аҘӢаҘӨ"` | Hindi naturally fronts the uncertainty as `аӨ№аҘӢ аӨёаӨ•аӨӨаӨҫ аӨ№аҘҲ аӨ•аӨҝ`; the replacement keeps the source-file object explicit and avoids describing a file itself as offline. | verified |

| `F-ja-083` | `ja` | `tools.video.seekValueText` | accessibility / runtime value clarity | `"{total} дёӯ {current}"` | `"зҸҫеңЁпјҡ{current}гҖҒеҗҲиЁҲпјҡ{total}"` | The video seek caller substitutes bare `M:SS` values into `aria-valuetext`. | `F-ka-003` | `ka` | `tools.paragraph.placeholder` | source completeness / omitted object | `"бғ“бғҗбғ¬бғ”бғ бғ”бғ— бғ бғҗбғӣбғ” бғҗбғң бғ“бғҗбғҗбғӯбғҳбғ бғ”бғ— / бғҗбғЎбғҗбғ бғ©бғ”бғ•бғҗбғ“"` | `"бғ“бғҗбғ¬бғ”бғ бғ”бғ— бғ бғҗбғӣбғ” бғҗбғң бғ“бғҗбғҗбғӯбғҳбғ бғ”бғ— / бғ®бғ”бғҡбғЎбғҗбғ¬бғ§бғқбғЎ бғҗбғЎбғҗбғ бғ©бғ”бғ•бғҗбғ“"` | The focus-only paragraph placeholder is a complete instruction, but the old purposive phrase ends at вҖңpress / to selectвҖқ and omits the source object вҖңa tool.вҖқ The replacement restores the genitive object using this dictionaryвҖҷs established `бғ®бғ”бғҡбғЎбғҗбғ¬бғ§бғқ` terminology, also used in [GoogleвҖҷs Georgian product UI](https://support.google.com/youtube/answer/9346683?hl=ka). | verified |
| `F-ka-004` | `ka` | `tools.toggle.bodyPlaceholder` | changed-English synchronization / omitted click result | `"бғӘбғҗбғ бғҳбғ”бғҡбғҳ бғ©бғҗбғӣбғқбғЎбғҗбғЁбғҡбғ”бғҡбғҳ. бғ“бғҗбғҗбғ¬бғҷбғҗбғһбғЈбғңбғ”бғ— бғҗбғң бғ©бғҗбғҗбғ’бғ“бғ”бғ— бғ‘бғҡбғқбғҷбғ”бғ‘бғҳ бғЁбғҳбғ’бғңбғҳбғ—."` | `"бғӘбғҗбғ бғҳбғ”бғҡбғҳ бғ©бғҗбғӣбғқбғЎбғҗбғЁбғҡбғ”бғҡбғҳ. бғ“бғҗбғҗбғ¬бғҷбғҗбғһбғЈбғңбғ”бғ— бғ‘бғҡбғқбғҷбғҳбғЎ бғ“бғҗбғЎбғҗбғӣбғҗбғўбғ”бғ‘бғҡбғҗбғ“ бғҗбғң бғ©бғҗбғ•бғҡбғ”бғ‘бғҳбғ— бғ’бғҗбғ“бғҗбғҳбғўбғҗбғңбғ”бғ— бғ‘бғҡбғқбғҷбғ”бғ‘бғҳ бғҗбғҘ."` | Georgian still translated the superseded вҖңClick or drop blocks insideвҖқ source and omitted the current click result вҖңadd a block.вҖқ Both toggle providers expose this clickable prompt and create and focus a child on click; GoogleвҖҷs Georgian UI uses the purposive [`вҖҰ бғ“бғҗбғЎбғҗбғӣбғҗбғўбғ”бғ‘бғҡбғҗбғ“ вҖҰ бғ“бғҗбғҗбғ¬бғҷбғҗбғһбғЈбғңбғ”бғ—`](https://support.google.com/youtube/answer/3219384?hl=ka) construction and [`бғ©бғҗбғ•бғҡбғ”бғ‘бғҳбғ— бғ’бғҗбғ“бғҗбғҳбғўбғҗбғңбғ”бғ—`](https://support.google.com/youtube/answer/3077589?hl=ka) for dragging. | verified |

Notion BokmГҘl uses the imperative phrases [Omtal en person and Omtal en side](https://www.notion.com/nb/help/writing-and-editing-basics). | verified |
| `F-no-080` | `no` | `tools.callout.emojiCategoryActivity` | established emoji-category terminology / number | `"Aktivitet"` | `"Aktiviteter"` | The emoji picker renders a category heading rather than a single activity; [Microsoft Teams BokmГҘl](https://support.microsoft.com/nb-no/teams/chat/send-an-emoji-gif-or-sticker-in-microsoft-teams) uses the plural category label `Aktiviteter`. | verified |
| `F-no-081` | `no` | `tools.image.previewControls` | accessibility / object context | `"Kontroller for forhГҘndsvisning"` | `"Kontroller for forhГҘndsvisning av bilde"` | The value labels the live image-preview toolbar, so the accessible name must retain the controlled image object; [AppleвҖҷs BokmГҘl guidance](https://support.apple.com/no-no/guide/pages-iphone/tana6bcd99e0/ios) corroborates the `Kontroller for вҖҰ av вҖҰ` construction. | verified |
| `F-no-082` | `no` | `toolNames.inlineCode` | tool distinction / established product terminology | `"Kode"` | `"Innebygd kode"` | The inline formatter currently shares the separate code-block toolвҖҷs generic title. | `F-no-083` | `no` | `searchTerms.number` | search alias / numbered-list semantics | `"nummer"` | `"nummerering"` | This hidden alias belongs only to the numbered-list entry. MicrosoftвҖҷs BokmГҘl editor UI uses [nummerering](https://support.microsoft.com/nb-no/office/legge-til-en-nummerert-liste-eller-punktliste-i-en-melding-732479eb-ad2b-4478-aff0-0c6251acc037) for the operation, distinct from sibling aliases `ordnet` and `liste`. | verified |
| `F-no-084` | `no` | `tools.image.navigationControls` | accessibility / group-purpose clarity | `"Bildenavigering"` | `"Navigering mellom bilder"` | The accessible group contains previous-image and next-image controls. | `F-no-085` | `no` | `tools.image.errorSourceOffline` | natural error copy / resource state | `"Kildefilen kan ha blitt flyttet eller vГҰre offline."` | `"Kildefilen kan ha blitt flyttet eller vГҰre utilgjengelig."` | A file is not naturally described as offline in BokmГҘl; the broken-image caller needs the broader moved-or-unavailable source state. | verified |
| `F-pa-001` | `pa` | `toolNames.clearFormat` | missing key / source coverage | `missing` | `"аЁ«аЁҫаЁ°аЁ®а©ҲаЁҹаЁҝа©°аЁ— аЁёаЁҫаЁ«аЁј аЁ•аЁ°а©Ӣ"` | LibreOffice Punjabi uses `аЁёаЁҝа©ұаЁ§а©Җ аЁ«аЁҫаЁ°аЁ®а©ҲаЁҹаЁҝа©°аЁ— аЁёаЁҫаЁ«аЁј аЁ•аЁ°а©Ӣ` for Clear Direct Formatting in its [official product source](https://github.com/LibreOffice/translations/blob/master/source/pa-IN/officecfg/registry/data/org/openoffice/Office/UI.po#L34689-L34695); the direct qualifier and accelerator are omitted for this compact inline command. | verified |
| `F-pl-001` | `pl` | `toolNames.clearFormat` | missing key / source coverage | `missing` | `"WyczyЕӣДҮ formatowanie"` | MicrosoftвҖҷs Polish editor UI uses the exact command [WyczyЕӣДҮ formatowanie](https://support.microsoft.com/pl-PL/PowerPoint/clear-all-text-formatting). | verified |
| `F-pl-002` | `pl` | `blockSettings.convertWithChildrenWarning` | number / terminology / source synchronization | `"Ten blok zawiera {count} zagnieЕјdЕјonych blokГіw. | `F-pl-003` | `pl` | `toolbox.optionAddAbove` | shortcut clarity | `"вҢҘ вҖ” dodaj powyЕјej"` | `"Kliknij z naciЕӣniДҷtym klawiszem вҢҘ, aby dodaДҮ powyЕјej"` | The toolbox hint requires an Option-click gesture; AppleвҖҷs Polish shortcut guidance identifies Option with `вҢҘ`. | verified |

| `F-pl-029` | `pl` | `a11y.atTop` | accessibility / count neutrality / shared single/group selection | `"Blok jest na gГіrze, nie moЕјna przenieЕӣДҮ wyЕјej"` | `"Nie moЕјna przenieЕӣДҮ wyЕјej. | `F-pl-030` | `pl` | `a11y.atBottom` | accessibility / count neutrality / shared single/group selection | `"Blok jest na dole, nie moЕјna przenieЕӣДҮ niЕјej"` | `"Nie moЕјna przenieЕӣДҮ niЕјej. | `F-sv-016` | `sv` | `a11y.blocksDuplicated` | number agreement / accessibility | `"{count} block duplicerade frГҘn position {position}"` | `"Duplicerade block: {count}. | `F-sv-017` | `sv` | `a11y.atTop` | accessibility / count neutrality / shared single/group selection | `"Blocket ГӨr hГ¶gst upp, kan inte flyttas uppГҘt"` | `"Kan inte flyttas uppГҘt. Redan hГ¶gst upp."` | This live-region key is shared by movement of one current block and a multi-block selection. Its two-clause action-and-cause announcement states that upward movement is unavailable because the current position is already at the top without naming a singular moved object; it is count-neutral for both paths. | verified |
| `F-sv-018` | `sv` | `a11y.atBottom` | accessibility / count neutrality / shared single/group selection | `"Blocket ГӨr lГӨngst ner, kan inte flyttas nedГҘt"` | `"Kan inte flyttas nedГҘt. | `F-sv-019` | `sv` | `a11y.searchResults` | accessibility / source synchronization | `"{count} resultat"` | `"SГ¶kresultat: {count}"` | The label-before-count form identifies what the live-region number represents and remains grammatical for every count. | verified |
| `F-sv-020` | `sv` | `a11y.allBlocksSelected` | number / punctuation / source synchronization | `"Alla block markerade, {count} block"` | `"Alla block markerade. Totalt: {count}"` | Avoids a comma splice and repeated count-sensitive noun while preserving the total. | verified |
| `F-sv-021` | `sv` | `a11y.blocksSelected` | number agreement / accessibility | `"{count} block markerade"` | `"Markerade block: {count}"` | Swedish participle agreement differs for one and many; the replacement is count-neutral. | verified |

| `F-sv-023` | `sv` | `a11y.navigationModeExited` | grammar / event state | `"Avslutade navigeringslГӨge"` | `"NavigeringslГӨget avslutades"` | The current phrase lacks definite agreement and an explicit event subject; the passive sentence announces the completed state naturally. | verified |
| `F-sv-024` | `sv` | `a11y.navigatedToBlock` | grammar / accessibility | `"Navigerade till block"` | `"Navigerat till blocket"` | The completed status announcement requires a resultative participle rather than a finite past-tense verb without a subject, and the definite noun identifies the specific block that received focus. | verified |

| `F-et-008` | `et` | `tools.table.placement` | context / control terminology | `"Paigutus"` | `"Joondus"` | вҖңJoondusвҖқ is the established Estonian UI term for alignment; вҖңPaigutusвҖқ is broader layout/placement. | verified |
| `F-et-009` | `et` | `a11y.blockDuplicated` | accessibility / terminology / spoken numeric relation | `"Plokk duplitseeritud positsioonile {position}/{total}"` | `"Plokk dubleeritud positsioonile {position}, kokku {total}"` | EKI records `dubleerima`/`dubleeritud`, matching the visible `Dubleeri` action. A corrected-byte follow-up also replaced the ambiguous slash with spoken aggregate `kokku`; the caller supplies the duplicated block's final index and total, and both placeholders remain exact. | verified |
| `F-et-010` | `et` | `a11y.blocksDuplicated` | accessibility / terminology | `"{count} plokki duplitseeritud alates positsioonist {position}"` | `"{count} plokki dubleeritud alates positsioonist {position}"` | вҖңDubleeritudвҖқ is the supported form and restores terminology consistency; both placeholders remain exact. | verified |
| `F-et-011` | `et` | `a11y.searchResults` | accessibility / number | `"{count} tulemust"` | `"Otsingutulemusi: {count}"` | The label-first partitive form avoids the invalid singular rendering вҖң1 tulemustвҖқ for every integer and retains {count}. | verified |
| `F-et-012` | `et` | `tools.callout.addEmoji` | source synchronization / terminology | `"Lisa emoji"` | `"Lisa ikoon"` | вҖңIkoonвҖқ preserves the broader product action instead of narrowing it to one symbol class. | verified |
| `F-et-013` | `et` | `tools.callout.filterEmojis` | search clarity / terminology | `"FiltreeriвҖҰ"` | `"Otsi emojisidвҖҰ"` | It names both the action and search object, unlike vague вҖңFiltreeriвҖҰвҖқ, and uses the attested Estonian emoji inflection and proper ellipsis. | verified |
| `F-et-014` | `et` | `tools.callout.noEmojisFound` | terminology / naturalness | `"Emotikone ei leitud"` | `"Emojisid ei leitud"` | Emoji pictographs are not emoticons made chiefly from punctuation; the corrected noun matches the actual dataset. | verified |
| `F-et-015` | `et` | `tools.callout.pickRandom` | action clarity | `"Juhuslik"` | `"Vali juhuslik emoji"` | The imperative states the button action and object; standalone вҖңJuhuslikвҖқ only says вҖңrandomвҖқ. | verified |
| `F-et-016` | `et` | `tools.callout.emojiCategoryPeople` | category scope / number | `"NaerunГӨgu ja inimesed"` | `"NaerunГӨod ja inimesed"` | The plural вҖңNaerunГӨodвҖқ agrees with the plural category scope and with English вҖңSmileysвҖқ. | verified |
| `F-et-017` | `et` | `tools.callout.colorDefault` | capitalization | `"vaikimisi"` | `"Vaikimisi"` | For the retained source-only вҖңDefaultвҖқ label, sentence-style UI capitalization requires an initial capital. The translation correction is valid even though the matrixвҖҷs caller attribution is not. | verified |
| `F-et-018` | `et` | `tools.quote.defaultSize` | capitalization | `"vaikimisi"` | `"Vaikimisi"` | Standalone localizable UI labels capitalize the first word; the lowercase current value is inconsistent in that menu. | verified |
| `F-et-019` | `et` | `tools.code.searchLanguage` | punctuation / search clarity | `"Otsi keelt..."` | `"Otsi keeltвҖҰ"` | Partitive singular вҖңkeeltвҖқ is idiomatic here, so plural вҖңkeeliвҖқ is not an improvement. Only the three-dot punctuation needs replacement with the required ellipsis character. | verified |
| `F-et-020` | `et` | `tools.link.jumpToSection` | terminology / naturalness | `"Mine sektsiooni"` | `"Mine jaotisse"` | вҖңJaotisвҖқ is the established Estonian document-UI term; вҖңsektsioonвҖқ is an avoidable loan in this context. | verified |
| `F-et-021` | `et` | `tools.link.linkTitle` | context / terminology | `"Lingi pealkiri"` | `"Lingi tekst"` | вҖңLingi tekstвҖқ names the actual field; вҖңLingi pealkiriвҖқ incorrectly implies a title attribute or document title. | verified |
| `F-et-022` | `et` | `tools.image.altDescription` | terminology / naturalness | `"Lisa alt-tekst, mis kirjeldab pilti. Nii muutub leht ligipГӨГӨsetavamaks vaegnГӨgijatele ja pimedatele."` | `"Kirjelda seda pilti inimestele, kes seda ei nГӨe."` | It follows the current sourceвҖҷs direct, purpose-led wording without narrowing beneficiaries to diagnoses and retains sentence punctuation. | verified |
| `F-et-023` | `et` | `tools.image.previewControls` | accessibility / specificity | `"Eelvaate juhtnupud"` | `"Pildi eelvaate juhtnupud"` | Adding вҖңPildiвҖқ makes the accessible name self-contained and restores the source scope. | verified |
| `F-et-024` | `et` | `tools.image.errorSourceOffline` | natural error copy | `"LГӨhtefail vГөib olla teisaldatud vГөi vГөrguГјhenduseta."` | `"LГӨhtefail vГөib olla teisaldatud vГөi kГӨttesaamatu."` | A file itself cannot naturally be вҖңvГөrguГјhendusetaвҖқ. | `F-et-025` | `et` | `tools.image.errorDefaultMessage` | natural error copy | `"URL tagastas vea. Proovi teist allikat vГөi lae fail uuesti Гјles."` | `"Pilti ei saanud sellelt URL-ilt laadida. | `F-et-026` | `et` | `tools.database.viewTypeListDescription` | terminology / naturalness | `"Lihtne lineaarne vaade"` | `"Kuva Гјksused lihtsas loendis"` | The action-led description restores вҖңitemsвҖқ and вҖңlistвҖқ and aligns structurally with its sibling view description. | verified |
| `F-et-027` | `et` | `tools.bookmark.loading` | terminology / naturalness | `"Eelvaate laadimine"` | `"Lingi eelvaate laadimineвҖҰ"` | It restores the source object вҖңlinkвҖқ and uses the standard no-space ellipsis for ongoing work. | verified |
| `F-et-028` | `et` | `tools.embed.empty` | context / read-only state | `"Manustamiseks kleebi link"` | `"Manustamislink puudub"` | A read-only empty state must report absence, not instruct the user to paste a link they cannot enter. | verified |
| `F-et-029` | `et` | `tools.linkPaste.mention` | terminology / naturalness | `"Mainimine"` | `"Maini"` | The imperative вҖңMainiвҖқ names the action; the noun вҖңMainimineвҖқ names an activity and is inconsistent with command labels. | verified |
| `F-et-030` | `et` | `tools.file.previewRender` | context / terminology | `"Vaade"` | `"Eelvaade"` | вҖңEelvaadeвҖқ precisely translates Preview and matches established Estonian UI terminology. | verified |
| `F-et-031` | `et` | `tools.video.alignmentLeft` | context / control terminology | `"Vasak"` | `"Joonda vasakule"` | The imperative exactly expresses вҖңAlign leftвҖқ and matches official Estonian alignment commands. | verified |
| `F-et-032` | `et` | `tools.video.alignmentCenter` | context / control terminology | `"Keskel"` | `"Joonda keskele"` | The imperative exactly expresses вҖңAlign centerвҖқ; locative вҖңKeskelвҖқ only describes a state. | verified |
| `F-et-033` | `et` | `tools.video.alignmentRight` | context / control terminology | `"Parem"` | `"Joonda paremale"` | The imperative exactly expresses вҖңAlign rightвҖқ and matches official Estonian alignment commands. | verified |

| `F-et-035` | `et` | `tools.audio.alignmentCenter` | context / control terminology | `"Keskel"` | `"Joonda keskele"` | The imperative exactly expresses вҖңAlign centerвҖқ; locative вҖңKeskelвҖқ only describes a state. | verified |
| `F-et-036` | `et` | `tools.audio.alignmentRight` | context / control terminology | `"Parem"` | `"Joonda paremale"` | The imperative exactly expresses вҖңAlign rightвҖқ and keeps audio and video controls aligned. | verified |
| `F-et-037` | `et` | `tools.audio.coverSourceAria` | accessibility / specificity | `"Pildi allikas"` | `"Kaanepildi allikas"` | вҖңKaanepildiвҖқ supplies the missing object and distinguishes this control from unrelated image-source fields. | verified |
| `F-et-038` | `et` | `a11y.allBlocksSelected` | accessibility / number | `"KГөik plokid valitud, {count} plokki"` | `"KГөik plokid valitud. Kokku: {count}"` | The label-first count avoids вҖң1 plokkiвҖқ, preserves {count}, and separates the complete status statements with correct punctuation. | verified |
| `F-et-039` | `et` | `a11y.navigatedToBlock` | accessibility / terminology | `"Liikuti plokile"` | `"Liiguti plokile"` | вҖңLiikutiвҖқ is not the past impersonal form of liikuma; вҖңLiigutiвҖқ fixes the spelling and inflection. | verified |
| `F-et-040` | `et` | `notifier.dismiss` | action semantics | `"Loobu"` | `"Sulge"` | вҖңSulgeвҖқ names closing the notification; вҖңLoobuвҖқ means abandoning or giving something up and mislabels the control. | verified |
| `F-et-041` | `et` | `tools.video.seek` | accessibility / interactive media terminology | `"Keri"` | `"Video ajaskaala"` | The real caller is an interactive range that seeks playback, not scrolling or a passive progress bar. The earlier intermediate `Video kerimisriba` and follow-up proposal `Video edenemisriba` therefore remained inaccurate. MicrosoftвҖҷs localized video-player guidance uses [`video ajaskaala`](https://support.microsoft.com/et-ee/office/videote-trimmimine-microsoft-stream-c41f21f5-e803-4dbf-99a6-65452003a1ee); the native slider role supplies the interaction. | verified |
| `F-et-042` | `et` | `tools.video.toggleTimeDisplay` | accessibility / state clarity | `"LГјlita ajanГӨit"` | `"Vaheta mГ¶Г¶dunud ja jГӨrelejГӨГӨnud aja vahel"` | It identifies both states and the switching action; generic вҖңLГјlita ajanГӨitвҖқ does not tell assistive-technology users what changes. | verified |
| `F-et-043` | `et` | `tools.video.ctxCopyUrlAtTime` | context / playback terminology | `"Kopeeri video URL praegusel ajal"` | `"Kopeeri video URL praegusest taasesituskohast"` | The current вҖңpraegusel ajalвҖқ means вҖңnowadaysвҖқ. Adding вҖңtaasesitusвҖқ to the proposalвҖҷs ambiguous вҖңesituskohtвҖқ makes the referenced playback position explicit. | verified |
| `F-et-044` | `et` | `tools.video.ctxStats` | terminology / tone | `"Statistika asjatundjatele"` | `"Esitusstatistika"` | It replaces obsolete вҖңstatistics for expertsвҖқ wording with the neutral current Playback statistics contract and matches the localeвҖҷs established media term вҖңEsituskiirusвҖқ. | verified |
| `F-et-045` | `et` | `tools.callout.emojiSearchResults` | terminology / naturalness | `"Leiti {count} emojit"` | `"Emojivasteid: {count}"` | The label-first partitive form preserves вҖңmatchesвҖқ while avoiding the invalid вҖң1 emojitвҖқ rendering for arbitrary counts; {count} remains exact. | verified |
| `F-et-046` | `et` | `a11y.dragStarted` | accessibility / impersonal state announcement | `"Lohistab plokki"` | `"Plokki lohistatakse"` | The old third-person form implies an unstated actor. | `F-et-047` | `et` | `a11y.dragStartedMultiple` | accessibility / impersonal state announcement / number | `"Lohistab {count} plokki"` | `"Lohistatakse {count} plokki"` | The caller selects this key only above one. The impersonal form fits a live-region announcement, and the numeral-governed singular partitive `plokki` follows [EKI number guidance](https://teatmik.eki.ee/teatmik/arvukirjutus/). | verified |
| `F-et-048` | `et` | `a11y.dropPosition` | accessibility / spoken numeric relation | `"Asetatakse positsioonile {position}/{total}"` | `"Asetatakse positsioonile {position}, kokku {total}"` | `Kokku` makes the aggregate explicit for speech and avoids the slash's ambiguous relationship while preserving both placeholders. The separately confirmed caller-level numeric defect cannot be corrected in translation. | verified |
| `F-et-049` | `et` | `a11y.blockMoved` | accessibility / spoken numeric relation | `"Plokk teisaldatud positsioonile {position}/{total}"` | `"Plokk teisaldatud positsioonile {position}, kokku {total}"` | The explicit aggregate reads naturally in a completion announcement and matches the existing Estonian moved-up and moved-down wording. | verified |
| `F-et-050` | `et` | `a11y.navigationModeEntered` | accessibility / localized key terminology | `"NavigeerimisreЕҫiim. Kasuta nooleklahve plokkide vahel liikumiseks, muutmiseks sisestusklahvi (Enter) ja vГӨljumiseks paoklahvi (Esc)."` | The standard localized key names make the instruction natural, while the parenthetical legends preserve recognition of the physical keys. Official Microsoft accessibility copy uses the same [`sisestusklahvi (Enter)` and `paoklahvi (Esc)`](https://support.microsoft.com/et-ee/accessibility/teams/basic-tasks-using-a-screen-reader-with-microsoft-teams) forms. | verified |
| `F-et-051` | `et` | `a11y.navigationPosition` | accessibility / spoken numeric relation | `"{tool}, {position}/{total}"` | `"{tool}, positsioon {position}, kokku {total}"` | The replacement explicitly labels both the ordinal and aggregate values while remaining concise for a throttled repeated live-region announcement. | verified |
| `F-et-052` | `et` | `tools.video.caption` | media-neutral terminology | `"Pildiallkiri"` | `"Pealdis"` | The editable text belongs to video, not a still picture. Official localized [LibreOffice help](https://help.libreoffice.org/latest/et/text/swriter/01/04060000.html) uses the generic UI term `Pealdis`. | verified |
| `F-et-053` | `et` | `tools.video.toggleCaption` | media-neutral terminology / source-only coverage | `"NГӨita vГөi peida pildiallkiri"` | `"NГӨita vГөi peida pealdis"` | The source-only contract has no production caller at this revision, but it should retain the same media-neutral caption terminology as the active video and audio fields. | verified |
| `F-et-054` | `et` | `tools.audio.caption` | media-neutral terminology | `"Pildiallkiri"` | `"Pealdis"` | `Pildiallkiri` is image-specific and especially inapt for author text under an audio card. `Pealdis` is the established generic caption term and matches the existing Estonian placeholder. | verified |
| `F-et-055` | `et` | `tools.video.seekValueText` | accessibility / spoken numeric relation | `"{current} / {total}"` | `"{current}, kokku {total}"` | The media slider exposes formatted current and maximum times as `aria-valuetext`; the explicit aggregate is clearer in speech than a slash and preserves both placeholders. | verified |
| `F-fa-003` | `fa` | `blockSettings.clickAction` | composed UI grammar | `"Ъ©Щ„ЫҢЪ© Ъ©ЩҶЫҢШҜ"` | `"ШЁШ§ Ъ©Щ„ЫҢЪ©"` | As a prefix fragment it supplies the shared instrumental phrase and composes into a natural imperative in both caller forms. | verified |
| `F-fa-004` | `fa` | `blockSettings.orConjunction` | composed UI grammar | `" ЫҢШ§ Ш§ШІ Ш§ЫҢЩҶ Щ…ЫҢШ§ЩҶвҖҢШЁШұ Ш§ШіШӘЩҒШ§ШҜЩҮ Ъ©ЩҶЫҢШҜ: "` | `" ЫҢШ§ Щ…ЫҢШ§ЩҶвҖҢШЁШұ "` | The coordinated noun phrase is grammatical under the shared В«ШЁШ§В» and preserves the caller-required leading and trailing ASCII spaces. | verified |
| `F-fa-005` | `fa` | `blockSettings.openMenuAction` | composed UI grammar | `" ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ ШЁШ§ШІ Ъ©ШұШҜЩҶ Щ…ЩҶЩҲ"` | `" Щ…ЩҶЩҲ ШұШ§ ШЁШ§ШІ Ъ©ЩҶЫҢШҜ"` | This suffix supplies the imperative predicate for both composed tooltips and preserves its required leading ASCII space. | verified |
| `F-fa-006` | `fa` | `blockSettings.dragToMove` | orthography / instruction clarity | `"ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ Ш¬Ш§ШЁШ¬Ш§ЫҢЫҢ ШЁЪ©ШҙЫҢШҜ"` | `"ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ Ш¬Ш§ШЁЩҮвҖҢШ¬Ш§ЫҢЫҢ ШЁЪ©ШҙЫҢШҜ"` | The proposal corrects the standard spelling with a ZWNJ without changing the concise drag instruction. | verified |
| `F-fa-007` | `fa` | `toolbox.optionAddAbove` | shortcut / instruction clarity | `"Option-Ъ©Щ„ЫҢЪ© ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ Ш§ЩҒШІЩҲШҜЩҶ ШҜШұ ШЁШ§Щ„Ш§"` | `"ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ Ш§ЩҒШІЩҲШҜЩҶ ШҜШұ ШЁШ§Щ„Ш§ШҢ Ъ©Щ„ЫҢШҜ Option ШұШ§ ЩҶЪҜЩҮ ШҜШ§ШұЫҢШҜ ЩҲ Ъ©Щ„ЫҢЪ© Ъ©ЩҶЫҢШҜ"` | It renders modifier-click as a complete Persian instruction while retaining the literal key name required by the UI. | verified |
| `F-fa-008` | `fa` | `toolbox.ctrlAddAbove` | shortcut / instruction clarity | `"Ctrl-Ъ©Щ„ЫҢЪ© ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ Ш§ЩҒШІЩҲШҜЩҶ ШҜШұ ШЁШ§Щ„Ш§"` | `"ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ Ш§ЩҒШІЩҲШҜЩҶ ШҜШұ ШЁШ§Щ„Ш§ШҢ Ъ©Щ„ЫҢШҜ Ctrl ШұШ§ ЩҶЪҜЩҮ ШҜШ§ШұЫҢШҜ ЩҲ Ъ©Щ„ЫҢЪ© Ъ©ЩҶЫҢШҜ"` | It matches attested Persian modifier-click syntax and keeps Ctrl unchanged as a keyboard label. | verified |
| `F-fa-009` | `fa` | `toolNames.bold` | established formatting terminology | `"Ш¶Ш®ЫҢЩ…"` | `"ЩҫШұШұЩҶЪҜ"` | В«ЩҫШұШұЩҶЪҜВ» is the attested formatting command; В«Ш¶Ш®ЫҢЩ…В» describes physical thickness. | verified |
| `F-fa-010` | `fa` | `tools.marker.textColor` | terminology / specificity | `"Щ…ШӘЩҶ"` | `"ШұЩҶЪҜ ЩҶЩҲШҙШӘШ§Шұ"` | The current value omits color, but the official Persian UI label is the more precise and directly attested В«ШұЩҶЪҜ ЩҶЩҲШҙШӘШ§ШұВ». | verified |
| `F-fa-011` | `fa` | `tools.paragraph.placeholder` | instruction clarity | `"ЪҶЫҢШІЫҢ ШЁЩҶЩҲЫҢШіЫҢШҜ ЫҢШ§ / ШұШ§ ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ Ш§ЩҶШӘШ®Ш§ШЁ ШЁШІЩҶЫҢШҜ"` | `"ЪҶЫҢШІЫҢ ШЁЩҶЩҲЫҢШіЫҢШҜ ЫҢШ§ ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ Ш§ЩҶШӘШ®Ш§ШЁ Ш§ШЁШІШ§ШұШҢ Ъ©Щ„ЫҢШҜ / ШұШ§ ЩҒШҙШ§Шұ ШҜЩҮЫҢШҜ"` | It restores the omitted object В«Ш§ШЁШІШ§ШұВ» and uses explicit keyboard-action wording around the literal slash key. | verified |
| `F-fa-012` | `fa` | `tools.table.clearSelection` | context / action accuracy | `"ЩҫШ§Ъ© Ъ©ШұШҜЩҶ"` | `"ЩҫШ§Ъ© Ъ©ШұШҜЩҶ Щ…ШӯШӘЩҲШ§"` | The added object distinguishes clearing cell contents from deleting the selected rows, columns, or cells. | verified |
| `F-fa-013` | `fa` | `tools.table.comfortableText` | context / mode terminology | `"Щ…ШӘЩҶ ШұШ§ШӯШӘ"` | `"Щ…ШӘЩҶ Щ…Ш№Щ…ЩҲЩ„ЫҢ"` | The comfortable mode only restores the regular editor font size; it does not increase spacing, so the input proposal would misdescribe behavior. | verified |
| `F-fa-014` | `fa` | `tools.table.placement` | context / control terminology | `"Щ…ЩҲЩӮШ№ЫҢШӘ"` | `"ШӘШұШ§ШІ"` | The picker controls horizontal and vertical alignment, for which В«ШӘШұШ§ШІВ» is the exact UI category rather than generic position. | verified |
| `F-fa-015` | `fa` | `a11y.dragHandle` | accessibility / clarity | `"ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ Ш¬Ш§ШЁШ¬Ш§ЫҢЫҢ ШЁЩ„ЩҲЪ© ШЁЪ©ШҙЫҢШҜ ЫҢШ§ ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ Щ…ЩҶЩҲ Ъ©Щ„ЫҢЪ© Ъ©ЩҶЫҢШҜ"` | `"ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ Ш¬Ш§ШЁЩҮвҖҢШ¬Ш§ЫҢЫҢ ШЁЩ„ЩҲЪ© ШЁЪ©ШҙЫҢШҜ ЫҢШ§ ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ ШЁШ§ШІ Ъ©ШұШҜЩҶ Щ…ЩҶЩҲ Ъ©Щ„ЫҢЪ© Ъ©ЩҶЫҢШҜ"` | It fixes standard orthography and states the click action as opening, not merely being 'for', the menu. | verified |

Sources: [LibreOffice Help NL вҖ” Nummering en nummeringsstijlen](https://help.libreoffice.org/latest/nl/text/swriter/guide/using_numbering.html); [LibreOffice Help NL вҖ” Nummering toevoegen](https://help.libreoffice.org/latest/nl/text/swriter/guide/using_numbered_lists2.html). | verified |

Source: [Adobe Muse reference](https://helpx.adobe.com/nl/pdf/muse_reference.pdf). | verified |

| `F-global-004` | all non-English | popover.search localized action placeholders | source dependency / caller context | All 68 localized values translated the old generic `Search` source and omitted the newly explicit action object. | Apply the independently reviewed action-oriented placeholder matrix to all 68 localized dictionaries, preserving native register and ellipsis. | The first full challenge corrected 23 register mismatches; a distinct second reviewer accepted all 68 corrected values, including explicit low-resource script-and-morphology checks. The final 69/69 matrix cases, all 2,237 guideline cases, i18n module regression, 87 scanner cases, and live 546-key/210-reference checker pass. | verified |
| `F-global-005` | all non-English | notifier.dismiss helper localization contract | dormant localization bypass / dependency injection | The exported dismiss-button helper is not currently used by production notifier rendering, but its built-in English lookup would bypass every localized dictionary if the internal helper were reused. | Keep the dormant helper source-safe by requiring any future caller to supply a localized accessible label instead of allowing the drawing utility to choose English. | An adversarial Bengali source review found the latent bypass and confirmed there is no current production caller. The helper-level regression failed with English `Dismiss`, then passed a Bengali label through unchanged after the helper began requiring injection and dropped its English-dictionary import; notifier-show tests continue to confirm that live toasts render no dismiss button. | verified |
| `F-global-006` | all non-English | tools.link.webLink catch-all labels | source dependency / caller scope / terminology | Sixty-seven localized labels still restricted the catch-all suggestion to a web page, while the first draft also preserved five weaker transliterated or non-native generic terms; Bosnian alone was already generic. | Apply the independently reviewed 68-locale generic-label matrix, including native Kannada `аІ•аіҠаІӮаІЎаІҝ`, Sorani `ШЁЫ•ШіШӘЫ•Шұ`, Malayalam `аҙ•аҙЈаөҚаҙЈаҙҝ`, locale-correct Nepali `аӨІаӨҝаӨҷаҘҚаӨ•`, and native Pashto `ШӘЪ“ЩҲЩҶЫҢ`. | Three disjoint family reviews covered 23+23+22 locales, and a distinct whole-matrix reviewer confirmed all 68 final values and all nine exact-English loanword retentions. The final fixture exactly matches the reviewed artifact at SHA-256 `7d489cef89d80cebd9557d0480600e0ab42d8db1a6bb2ec698bc472559fee614`; its coverage case and Bosnian passed red, the other 67 locale cases failed red, and all 69 dictionary cases, 76 caller cases, 2,543 guideline cases, and the live 546-key/208-reference checker pass after remediation. | verified |
| `F-global-007` | all non-English | detached editor UI direction contract | caller / portal ancestry / bidirectional layout / accessibility | Body- and Top-Layer-mounted tooltip, popover, and lightbox roots lose their owning editor ancestry; the isolation reset forces non-inline tooltip/popover direction to initial/LTR, while lightbox inherits the host body. Nested desktop submenus under an RTL inline popover are also reset to LTR. | On every open, resolve the effective owning editor direction and apply both semantic `dir` and inline-important CSS `direction` to every detached or reset UI root; refresh the tooltip singleton across mixed-direction editors and support explicit direction for virtual roots. | Two independent Chromium reproductions confirmed that the Persian dictionary and editor wrapper are correctly RTL while affected roots compute LTR; `dir` alone still loses to the reset. The frozen challenge identifies 25 direct and at least 59 built-in affected keys. Six regression tests failed before remediation. After the body-root fallback correction, a distinct reviewer found no blocker and passed 169/169 focused cases; the broader related unit gate passes 687/687, and Chromium passes the 29-test tooltip file with direct computed-direction verification. | verified |

| `F-global-008` | all non-English | drag move destination contract | caller / accessibility / move indexing / structural integrity | Drop previews announced a raw pre-removal boundary instead of the first moved block's final position, producing overstated or impossible values; multiple execution also returned the raw slot and misordered supported non-contiguous or variable-width nested groups. Invalid descendant and stale targets could still display indicators, and side-drop source filtering could detach nested children. | Resolve one move contract from the live flat array, explicit sources, physical carried footprint, logical ancestry, target, and edge; use its final first index for previews and results, anchor execution to the live target, preserve nested/non-contiguous order, validate indicators in every mode, and keep nested children attached during side drops. | The frozen Estonian caller challenge records six exact numeric scenarios. Red-first unit and integration cases cover formula, execution, lifecycle, staleness, duplicate, physical/logical descendant, indicator, and horizontal source-filter contracts. A distinct read-only reviewer found no blocker and independently passed the 132-case focused gate, scoped ESLint, full TypeScript, and whitespace checks. | verified |

## Exact-English Retentions

Record every non-English value that is exactly identical to English. The only
allowed categories are `universal notation`, `product-brand`, `acronym`,
`established cognate`, and `established loanword`. Similar spelling alone is
not a justification; the source must support normal unchanged use in the
locale and UI context.
